---
title: Articles
toc: true
---

# kalshi Articles

In-depth guides and tutorials for using the package.

- [Authenticating with the Kalshi API](vignettes/articles/authentication.qmd)
- [Getting Started with kalshi](vignettes/articles/getting-started.qmd)
- [Finding Markets: Series, Events, and Tickers](vignettes/articles/finding-markets.qmd)
